text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Waaagh, it's an emergency! I spilled the milk,
Fuku!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Eeeek, it's coming this way! Spilt milk, or any
liquids that be, depart from this room
immediately!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur (From the Hallway)
text_block_list.text: Shut up!

text_block_list.name: The Matikanes
text_block_list.text: Eep! We're sorry!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sigh... We got yelled at yet again...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Our room gets so noisy, it's no wonder
people call it the "jump scare room."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Grrr... We mustn't let our reputation sink any
further! In order to cleanse our record...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's hit the streets tomorrow and really have
some fun! That way, we'll use up all our energy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Makes sense to me. Okie-dokie, let's put the P in
party!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
First up, we've gotta sing some karaoke!
Health is weaaalth! Disasters begooone!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whoooa-oooh! We are the Matikaneeees! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now let's get down and boogie! Hoppity,
woopity, woop!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Dum-dee-dum, doopee-doo! ♪ La-di-daa!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And now to get everything off our chests! Let's
scream it from the rooftops!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
MY FORTUNES ONLY HAVE A FIFTY-FIFTY
CHANCE OF COMING TRUUUE!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
YES, I MIGHT BE WISHY-WASHY, BUT... BUT! I
DON'T KNOW WHAT TO SAY RIGHT NOOOW!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Phew, we really put ourselves to work today, huh,
Fuku?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I spent my very last drop of energy... I
better get some sleep, like now...

text_block_list.name: The Matikanes
text_block_list.text: Snoooooore! Snooooorkhh!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur (From the Hallway)
text_block_list.text: SHUT UUUP!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The dorm continues to rumble with snores and
angry yelling.
